text:
Judul: Data Analyst
Perusahaan: PT Matahari Department Store Tbk
Lokasi: Karawaci, Banten
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: -
Keahlian: data analysis, business operations, project support, analytical skills, numerical skills, Microsoft Excel, data visualization

Deskripsi:
Responsibilities: Collect, manage, and analyze large datasets related to store performance and operational efficiency. Support ongoing business and improvement projects by providing data insights, reports, and dashboards. Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Operations, Merchandising, and Finance) to ensure accuracy and consistency of business data. Assist in identifying trends, issues, and opportunities based on data analysis to support decision-making. Develop and improve data tracking systems or templates to increase reporting efficiency. Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Statistics, Industrial Engine

mprove data tracking systems or templates to increase reporting efficiency. Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Statistics, Industrial Engineering, or a related field. 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business operations, or project support. Strong analytical and numerical skills with attention to detail. Proficient in Microsoft Excel and familiar with data visualization tools. Comfortable handling large datasets and transforming them into actionable insights.

Judul: Machine Learning Staff - Remote Work
Perusahaan: RGF HR Agent Indonesia
Lokasi: Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: Mid-level
Keahlian: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Python, scikit-learn, pandas, TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, OpenCV, CUDA

Deskripsi:
About the Company: The working venue is in Jakarta. Our client is an IT Consulting company. Currently, they are looking for Machine Learning Staff - Remote Work. Job Responsibilities: Translate and refine business goals into appropriate machine learning objectives. Design and implement ML/DL solutions and integrate them with various Big Data platforms and architectures. Create and maintain ML pipelines that are scalable, robust, and ready for production. Collaborate with domain experts, software developers, and data scientists. Troubleshoot ML/DL model issues, including recommendations for retrain, re-validate, and improve

in experts, software developers, and data scientists. Troubleshoot ML/DL model issues, including recommendations for retrain, re-validate, and improvements/optimization. Other related tasks as assigned. Job Requirements: Min 1+ years of experience in data scientist/analyst. Hands-on experience in building ML models deployed into real-world business applications or research. Working knowledge of ML/DL algorithms (classification, regression, clustering, hyperparameter tuning, etc). Proficiency with Python and libraries for machine learning such as scikit-learn and pandas. Good understanding of Deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, MXNet, etc. Experience in using computer vision libraries such as OpenCV, PIL. Preferable Skill / Experience: Experience working with cloud services platform (AWS or GCP) to build ML/DL pipelines. Experience in multi-GPU model training with

Skill / Experience: Experience working with cloud services platform (AWS or GCP) to build ML/DL pipelines. Experience in multi-GPU model training with CUDA. Experience in ML experiment tracking tools (e.g. WandB, Neptune, TensorBoard). Experience in model deployment using Docker (e.g. AWS SageMaker, Google Kubernetes Engine). Experience in model compression or quantization for on-edge-device inference. Experience with Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD). Relevant certifications in machine learning and cloud technologies (e.g., AWS, Coursera) would be a plus. [Only CV in English will be processed]

Judul: Senior Data Scientist
Perusahaan: PT Solusi Transportasi Indonesia
Lokasi: Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: Senior
Keahlian: Data ETL, Dashboard creation, Data analysis, SQL, Data visualization, Statistical analysis, Bilingual (Bahasa & English)

Deskripsi:
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp, providing services from meal delivery to financial management. The team focuses on innovation and operational excellence by turning data into actionable strategies. The role involves data ETL, dashboard creation, and providing data support to the Transformation and Strategy Office. Responsibilities include analyzing business performance, leading explorations of business opportunities, localizing models for new markets, and developing analytics tools. Essential skills include 4+ years of experience in e-commerce, a degree in a relevant field, SQL proficiency, and strong st
eveloping analytics tools. Essential skills include 4+ years of experience in e-commerce, a degree in a relevant field, SQL proficiency, and strong statistical knowledge.

Judul: Senior Java Software Engineer
Perusahaan: CSG International Sdn. Bhd.
Lokasi: Bali, Indonesia
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: Senior
Keahlian: Java SE, Linux, Docker, GitHub, Maven, Kubernetes, AWS, Azure, PL/PGSQL, MyBatis, Camunda BPMN Engine, REST API

Deskripsi:
About CSG: CSG is a multinational organization headquartered in the United States with more than 5000 employees in countries around the world. We’re a SaaS platform company that helps some of the world’s most recognizable brands solve their toughest business challenges. Our innovative solutions and trusted experts enable companies to create customer experiences that set them apart. At CSG, you're more than your resume. We want your diverse perspective and unique background to help us enrich the work we do together. We believe that by channeling the power of all, we make ordinary customer and employee experiences extr

und to help us enrich the work we do together. We believe that by channeling the power of all, we make ordinary customer and employee experiences extraordinary. This is your opportunity to join one of our high-performing teams. Channel the power of YOU and begin the journey to becoming a CSGer. About the role: Joining our team as a Senior Java Developer you will collaborate with our cross-functional team to design, build, and optimize features/technology for the CSG Quote & Order product. In your first 90 days, you’ll get comfortable with our system, build strong relationships with the team, and kick-off new feature development to deliver awesome outcomes for our customers. What you will do: Champion clean, efficient code by giving thoughtful PR feedback and holding the team to high standards. Mentor and inspire the team by sharing your expertise and helping others level up their skills.

ul PR feedback and holding the team to high standards. Mentor and inspire the team by sharing your expertise and helping others level up their skills. Collaborate with product and design teams to translate customer needs into impactful, user-friendly features. Take ownership across our systems. Spot inefficiencies, resolve bottlenecks and keep everything running like clockwork. Evaluate new tools, frameworks, and trends to keep us at the forefront of innovation and productivity. You Should Have: You’ve been building with modern Java SE (17+) for 5+ years and know your stuff. You thrive on teamwork, can communicate and collaborate easily with your teammates. Linux and Docker are your natural habitat. You’re completely at home in this environment. You know your way around the development tools like GitHub, Maven and Kubernetes. Bonus points if you’ve dabbled in: AWS/Azure, PL/PGSQL, MyBati

ment. You know your way around the development tools like GitHub, Maven and Kubernetes. Bonus points if you’ve dabbled in: AWS/Azure, PL/PGSQL, MyBatis, Camunda BPMN Engine, REST API frameworks and other parts of our technology stack. Perks & benefits: Work from anywhere: CSG has a global policy called 'Flexibility First' that allows employees to work from wherever they feel most productive. The Quote & Order team does not maintain a dedicated office space, so your position will be 100% remote with the exception of several in-person workshops during the year (in Bali – see below – and Melbourne). Twice-yearly workshops in Bali: Twice a year the whole Quote & Order team gets together in Bali, Indonesia for dedicated in-person time including team presentations, hackathon sessions, training and team-building activities. Paid volunteer days: Everyone at CSG gets two paid days per year to vol

team presentations, hackathon sessions, training and team-building activities. Paid volunteer days: Everyone at CSG gets two paid days per year to volunteer at a community organization of your choice.

Judul: Graphic Designer
Perusahaan: PT DECA
Lokasi: Jakarta Utara, Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Contract/Temporary
Senioritas: Entry Level
Keahlian: Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Adobe Creative Suite, Typography, Digital Imaging

Deskripsi:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating visual assets that strengthen brand identity across various platforms, from social media to digital ads. This position is open for fresh graduates with strong portfolios and a passion for design. Responsibilities include creating visual assets for digital platforms, developing design layouts for marketing materials, supporting the creative team, ensuring consistency of brand identity, staying updated with design trends, and collaborating with the team. A diploma or bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design or a related

of brand identity, staying updated with design trends, and collaborating with the team. A diploma or bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design or a related field is required. Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite is essential, along with good communication skills and attention to detail.

Perusahaan: PT DECA
Lokasi: Jakarta Utara, Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Kontrak/Temporer
Senioritas: Fresh Graduate
Keahlian: Adobe Creative Suite, Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Graphic Design, Visual Communication Design

Deskripsi:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team. This position is open for fresh graduates with strong portfolios and passion for design. Responsibilities include creating visual assets for digital platforms, developing design layouts for marketing materials, supporting the creative team, ensuring consistency of brand identity, staying updated with design trends, and collaborating with the team. A Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Desi

ing consistency of brand identity, staying updated with design trends, and collaborating with the team. A Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design or related field is required. Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite is essential, along with good communication skills and attention to detail.

Judul: Product Manager
Perusahaan: Demandlane
Lokasi: Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: -
Keahlian: Project Management, Automation, AI, Data Analytics, Compliance, Risk Management, Campaign Strategy, Cross-functional Collaboration

Deskripsi:
DemandLane specializes in claimant acquisition services for law firms across the United States. Our mission is to connect law firms with individuals actively seeking legal representation after experiencing significant injuries or injustices. We are looking for a Product Manager / Product Operations Manager - US Market to drive operational excellence, streamline processes, and optimize engagement strategies across voice, text, and AI-based automation workflows. Key responsibilities include overseeing project and process management, designing engagement strategies, optimizing dialing and texting strategies, ensuring compliance, conducting

overseeing project and process management, designing engagement strategies, optimizing dialing and texting strategies, ensuring compliance, conducting data analysis, and managing team and vendor relationships. Preferred experience includes 5+ years in Product Operations or related fields, with a strong knowledge of CRM platforms and customer engagement tools.

Judul: Corporate Finance
Perusahaan: RGF HR Agent Indonesia
Lokasi: Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: Mid-level
Keahlian: Financial analysis, Financial modeling, Business development, Project financing, Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint

Deskripsi:
About the Company: The working venue is in South Jakarta. Our client is a Japanese energy company. Currently, they are looking for a Corporate Finance professional. Job Responsibilities: Conduct financial and commercial analysis for project development opportunities. Build, update, and maintain financial models and business case reports. Perform industry, financial, and economic research to support project feasibility assessments. Monitor and summarize regulatory frameworks related to the energy and power sector. Participate in project financing discussions with lenders and investors. Support business development initiatives, including

energy and power sector. Participate in project financing discussions with lenders and investors. Support business development initiatives, including commercial discussions with external partners. Prepare presentations, reports, and proposals for management and external audiences. Ensure the accuracy, integrity, and clarity of all financial and business analyses presented to decision-makers. Other duties as assigned. Job Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, or Industrial Engineering. Business level of English. Minimum 3 years of relevant experience, preferably in project development, corporate finance, or finance feasibility projects in energy sectors. Strong financial analysis and modeling skills, with advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel. Skilled in PowerPoint for preparing effective business presentations. High attention to detail, strategic mindset, and profession

in Microsoft Excel. Skilled in PowerPoint for preparing effective business presentations. High attention to detail, strategic mindset, and professional communication skills. Willing to travel for business across Indonesia and overseas. [Only CV in English will be processed].

Judul: Investment Associate
Perusahaan: RGF HR Agent Indonesia
Lokasi: Jakarta Raya
Tipe Kerja: Full time
Senioritas: Mid-level
Keahlian: Business, Economics, Venture Capital, English, Bahasa Indonesia, Financial Analysis, Research

Deskripsi:
About the Company: The working venue is in South Jakarta. Our client is a Japanese Securities / Investment Trusts company. Currently, they are looking for an Investment Associate. Job Responsibilities: Deal Sourcing and Execution: conduct industry research, deal sourcing and investment execution for fast growing private companies (Indonesia mainly). The execution process includes due diligence, investment memo preparation, documentation, and reporting to HQ. Portfolio Management and Value Creation: manage, monitor and work closely with portfolio companies to provide ongoing support including facilitating synergies between portfolios / company Group

nage, monitor and work closely with portfolio companies to provide ongoing support including facilitating synergies between portfolios / company Group businesses. Relationship Management: expand his/her professional network in founders and entrepreneur community. Any other ad hoc job requires. Job Requirements: Bachelor’s / master’s degree in Business, Economics, or any related fields from reputable universities. Min. 3 years of experience in Venture Capital. Verbal and written fluency in English and Bahasa Indonesia. A fast learner with an excellent work ethic. Passionate in the startup / tech / venture space. Able to analyze and evaluate financial reports. Able to read and understand investment contracts and agreements. Eager to do thorough research and make a presentation report for prospective investment portfolio. Able to work with team and/or independently. [Only CV in English will
gh research and make a presentation report for prospective investment portfolio. Able to work with team and/or independently. [Only CV in English will be processed]
